summary: Create your own Mac apps by chatting with AI Discussion | Link
content: Glaze is the easiest way to go from an idea to a Mac app. Describe what you want, and it builds a real app that lives in your dock, launches instantly, works offline, and taps into the full power of your computer. Software that's finally personal, shaped around you. From the makers of Raycast.
chineseSummary: 通过与 AI 聊天创建您自己的 Mac 应用程序 | 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Glaze 是将想法转变为 Mac 应用程序的最简单方法。描述您想要什么，它就会构建一个真正的应用程序，该应用程序位于您的扩展坞中，立即启动，离线工作，并充分利用您计算机的全部功能。最终个性化、围绕您打造的软件。来自 Raycast 的制作者。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
